title: MG’s Generators
description: This mod adds item- and block generators to the game
body:
Bored of getting resources? No problem! This mod solves your problem! Craft generators and they generate resources for you! You can just do other stuff like building and exploring, And when you get home, you’ll have a lot of resources! (If the chunks are loaded)When you place down a generator, every 10 seconds the item will spawn on top of it. It’s very easy to make farms like iron, food and even diamond! To craft the Generators first you need a Generator Core and 4 of the item you want to be generated(You can find the recipes in the gallery)

Created using MCreator
